meaning: n.(针灸术用的)艾,艾的代用品,[植]艾篙
examples: Conclusion Moxa-cone moxibustion possesses homeostatic effect.
Home is the holiday, we get up early in the morning, bath, wash a moxa grass.
A moxa cone placed directly on the point and ignited is called direct moxibustion.
Moxa cones and sticks are made of dried mugwort leaves.
This stimulation involves the burning of moxa (mugwort) or the insertion of needles into points on these channels, with the aim to restore the bodys balance and prevent and treat disease.
